name: Root_05_01
title: Root Bulwark
effect:
Place a Bulwark token. 
Cannot win or lose. 
If this leaves no winners, 
the Strike is a stalemate.

name: Root_05_02
title: Root Flourish
effect:
Gain a worm 🪱.
Each of your worms
is worth 2 more.

name: Root_05_03
title: Root Renewal
effect:
Mulch any die
from discard

name: Root_05_04
title: Root Reservoir
effect:
Reroll a die until that die
rolls 3 or higher

name: Root_07_01
title: Root Nourish
effect:
🎲 Raise any die +2.
Gain a Water token.

name: Root_07_02
title: Root Reflection
effect:
🎲 May Raise any die +1. 
then if 2 dice match: 
🎲 Raise ×2 (double) both.

name: Root_07_03
title: Root Reinforced
effect: 🎲 Raise ×2 (double) one die

name: Root_07_04
title: Root Resonance
effect:
🎲 Raise ×2 (double)
all dice showing 1–4

name: Root_09_01
title: Root Awakening
effect:
Upgrade a die; 
use the upgraded die now.

name: Root_09_02
title: Root Cause
effect:
Flip one of your die
to its opposite face

name: Root_09_03
title: Root Loot
effect:
Set a die to match
the value of another

name: Root_09_04
title: Root Reach
effect:
For each 🪱 worm you have,  
🎲 Raise any die +2.
then DIscard 1 Worm 🪱
 If you have 3 or more.

name: Flower_11_01
title: Acutely Floral
effect:
Gain or Steal a Bee 🐝.
Each of your Bees
is worth 2 more this round.

name: Flower_11_02
title: Parting Thorn
effect:
The winner of one chosen
strike row takes a wound

name: Flower_11_03
title: Petal To Die 4
effect:
Choose one:
Gain D4 (set to 4),
or Trash D4 then
Gain D8 (set to 8).

name: Flower_11_04
title: Transplant Tulip
effect: Swap two of your dice

name: Flower_14_01
title: Bloom Backbone
effect:
For each grafted
Root or Vine, 
🎲 Raise any die +1

name: Flower_14_02
title: Bursting Blossom

name: Flower_14_03
title: Gust of Petals
effect:
Higher opposing dice
reroll on one strike row

name: Flower_14_04
title: Siphon Snapdragon
effect:
On one strike row, 
drain all higher die by 2, 
🎲 raising one of your die
by 2 each

name: Flower_17_01
title: Bee-trieval
effect:
Draw any 1 die
from your discard pile

name: Flower_17_02
title: Bloom Backflip
effect:
Higher opposing dice flip
on one strike row

name: Flower_17_03
title: Edelweiss²
effect:
You may play
up to 2 other cards

name: Flower_17_04
title: Queen’s Blossom
effect: Draw 2 dice

name: Vine_07_01
title: Berry Important
effect:
🎲 Raise any die +1. 
⭐ End Game: +2 VP.

name: Vine_07_02
title: De-Vine Exchange
effect:
🎲 Raise any die +1. 
⭐ End Game: +1 VP
per Flower.

name: Vine_07_03
title: Twist and Swarm
effect:
🎲 Raise +1
to any 3 dice

name: Vine_07_04
title: Vine Lash
effect: 🎲 Raise a die +3

effect:
Repeat the effect

Vines or Roots

immediately

name: Vine_09_03
title: Reaping Tendrils
effect:
Gain 1 Mulch token.

Cleanup: Mulch 1 die
instead of discarding.

(🪱/🐝)

name: Vine_11_01
title: Saplink Trellis
effect:
For each Vine,
🎲 Raise any die +2

to flip 1 of their 
face up Vines face down

Set a die up to a D12
